My R toolset

Jan 9, 2017

In this post I will share a few standard R snippets that would be useful for some Machine Learning Problems. I learnt these from the ISLR by Gareth James, Daniela Witten, Trevor Hastie and Robert Tibshirani, most examples are taken directly from this book.

CONTENTS

  • Some basics
  • Linear Regression
  • Train-Test Split
  • Logistic Regression
  • Linear Discriminant Analysis (LDA)
  • K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN)
  • Cross Validation
  • Bootstrap
  • Decision Trees
  • Random Forest
  • Gradient Boosted Trees

Some basics

In this blog I will explain my projects put up on github, report some data analysis I perform and also put up notes on some interesting topics.
